column1: Investment Analysis: SIP vs Loan + Lumpsum
1. Scenario 1 delivers 10.7X higher returns than Scenario 2
2. SIP has lower risk - no loan burden
3. Monthly commitment in SIP is lower (40000 vs 46308)
4. Rupee cost averaging benefit in SIP
5. No default risk or credit score impact
2. If you can invest the lumpsum in higher return assets (>15%)
3. If tax benefits on loan interest are significant
4. If you have strong cash reserves for emergencies
Scenario 1: Market volatility (mitigated by long term + SIP)
Scenario 2: Loan default risk + concentration risk + higher total cost
Where: P = Monthly SIP | r = Monthly rate | n = Months
Where: P = Principal | r = Annual rate | n = Years
Where: P = Loan | r = Monthly rate | n = Months
